title: Slovakian Cabbage Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish, these cabbage dumplings are a hearty and flavorful meal. Serve with your favorite toppings or in a delicious soup.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Add the Slovakian dumplings to the boiling water and cook according to package instructions.
While the dumplings are cooking, sauté the chopped onion and cabbage in butter until softened.
Once the dumplings are done, drain them and add them to the skillet with the cabbage and onion.
Add milk to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the cabbage and dumplings hot, topped with additional butter and milk if desired.
